---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a change or addition to vibe
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Problem**

What are you trying to do that vibe makes hard or can't do?

**Proposed shape**

Roughly how you'd want it to work. A flag? A new default? A hook?

**Willing to PR?**

Yes / no. If yes, read `CONTRIBUTING.md` first — vibe is dogfood-built (contribute to vibe using vibe), and both gates plus the TODO/CHANGELOG convention apply.
